context: Tests whether the agent corrects TipKit configuration timing, testing overrides, and first-launch display policy.

checklist.name: App initialization
checklist.description: States that `Tips.configure(_:)` should run once during app initialization before any tips display, not from `ContentView.task`, `onAppear`, or another view lifecycle hook.

checklist.name: Reset ordering
checklist.description: States that `Tips.resetDatastore()` must run before `Tips.configure(_:)` and should be limited to debug, preview, or test setup.

checklist.name: Production override safety
checklist.description: Rejects shipping `showAllTipsForTesting()` or related testing overrides behind a production runtime flag.

checklist.name: UI test launch arguments
checklist.description: Uses built-in TipKit launch arguments or debug-gated custom launch arguments before `XCUIApplication.launch()`.

checklist.name: Display policy
checklist.description: Recommends rules, sensible display frequency, display limits, and invalidation instead of forcing every tip to appear immediately on first launch.

checklist.name: Scope control
checklist.description: Keeps the answer focused on TipKit setup and testing rather than drifting into unrelated SwiftUI navigation or general onboarding design.
